# Daily Report ‚Äî 2026-07-09

## Task Completed
Added `cancel_incident` tool: PATCH incident state to 8 (Cancelled) via the Table API.
Accepts an incident number (e.g. INC0010001) or 32-char sys_id; resolves number‚Üísys_id with a
single GET before patching. Optional `cancel_reason` field is written as a work note so the
cancellation is auditable. Tool registered in `service_desk` and `full` packages.
